questions.question: How can an LLM handle very long contexts by compressing the key-value cache while keeping the most recent tokens accurate?
How can confidence scores for LLM-generated text-to-SQL queries be calibrated using SQL sub-clause information instead of raw model probabilities?
Which approach generates photo-realistic flood images on user-chosen photos to make climate change effects feel concrete, even without suitable paired training data?
How can multiple LLM-based agents decide whether a web attack needs a new intrusion detection rule or only a repair to an existing rule?
What framework diagnoses CI/CD pipeline failures from logs, reuses historical fixes with RAG, and applies automated repairs through tool-calling?
What practical method converts simulated low-precision quantization into true 8-bit GPU inference for 3D medical image segmentation models?
Which benchmark evaluates LLMs on natural-language-to-PostGIS query generation, including spatial data types, coordinate systems, PostGIS functions, and schema retrieval?
How can a foundation agent control arbitrary software and games without built-in APIs by using screenshots as input and keyboard or mouse actions as output?
How can Arabic NLP measure dialectness as a continuous sentence-level variable rather than treating dialect identification as only a binary task?
What networking architecture for constrained IoT devices uses modular interfaces, multiple heterogeneous stacks, and GNRC as a cleanly layered default network stack?
